raw.subject: Saw your post about Chaparral freezing
raw.body:
Hi,

 I saw your post about Chaparral freezing, but JBS Towing and Recovery warming up - it caught my eye. The way you're using social media to connect with your community is great.

 But I noticed you don't have a website, which might be making it harder for people to find and contact you when they need towing services. 

 On a whim, I pulled together a quick page concept using your Facebook photos and posts. It includes an emergency call section, a list of your services, and a map of your service area.

 https://damianbasilio.github.io/f/preview/jbs-towing-and-recovery-chaparral/

 No pressure, just thought I'd share. If you're interested in discussing a paid project, I'm here to help - reply or give me a quick call, whichever you prefer.
